feed.title: U.S. District Court, District of Maine — Opinions
feed.subtitle: Full-text D. Maine opinions via CourtListener (Free Law Project), a free Atom feed of the court's published opinions with citation metadata. Replaces the former page_monitor gateway to med.uscourts.gov/district-court-opinions, which was a static "find opinions on govinfo.gov" page that listed no opinions of its own.

entry.title: Brittany Wood v. Penobscot County Jail, et al.

entry.title: Monitoring started: U.S. District Court, District of Maine — District Court Opinions (gateway)
entry.content: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
